text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure we'll be able to see<n>shooting
stars? The sky's so cloudy!
choice_data_list: We just have to wait a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've come out to help with a meteor<n>shower
viewing event for children.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's only an hour to sunset, but the<n>weather
report doesn't look<n>promising.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Still, you never know! Things might<n>clear up
suddenly! We just have to<n>trust the skies and be
patient!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I hope it'll clear as well, but if we're<n>going to
cancel the event, it'd be wise<n>to do so sooner
than later. As our<n>supervisor, what do you think
we<n>should do?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Well, in that case, let's make our own<n>shooting
stars!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat the details! ☆ For now,<n>we need to
go to Tracen! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Thanks for your patience, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this marvelousmeteor shower that's exclusiveto Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Here we go! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Twinkle! Glitter!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As Marvelous Sunday sprints about<n>with light
sticks, their afterimage<n>creates a smattering of
sparkling<n>lights under the cloudy skies...<n>
They're a far cry from real shooting<n>stars
though.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hahaha! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she continues to run around,<n>and the
glow from the light sticks<n>seems to last longer
and longer as<n>she speeds up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: This marvelous show's just getting<n>started!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
What? When did the clouds scatter?<n>How can
this be?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Dazzling and beautiful! It's<n>maaarvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The clouds dissipate and the beautiful<n>night sky
unrolls above us. It's almost<n>as if there were
never any clouds in<n>the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Sparkle! ☆

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look! It's a shooting star! Did<n>you see that
flash?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But the bizarre trajectory is nothing<n>like a
shooting star's!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Ooh, it's flying around! That's so<n>cool!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Are we experiencing a mass<n>hallucination? That
light can't be<n>natural!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Okay, time for the grand finale!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
These stars have been simply<n>marvelous! ☆
Thank you for the<n>dazzling memories!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Glitter! Gleam!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When the moment passes, the<n>shooting stars
and mysterious lights<n>vanish, and the night sky
looks<n>perfectly unremarkable once again.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! ☆ That was so beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It was indeed, though I'm more<n>curious about
what that flying light<n>was exactly.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
What do you make of that<n>phenomenon we
saw?
choice_data_list:
Maybe we were seeing things because we're
tired?

I want to see it again so I can figure out what it
was!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's logical, but it doesn't explain<n>everything.
I'd like to conduct a proper<n>study...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the strange<n>experience,
Marvelous Sunday and<n>Ikuno Dictus come to
chat with me.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look at this! The kids from the other<n>day drew
some pictures of the meteor<n>shower!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Their illustrations are of countless<n>shooting stars
streaking across the<n>sky... and one particularly
bright light.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It appears we all witnessed the same<n>
phenomenon. What happened that<n>night can't be
explained away as a<n>mere dream.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! It was a marvelous<n>night! ☆
Marvelous beyond<n>explanation, in fact! ★

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... For some reason, it's quite<n>convincing
when you put it that way.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Let's see if Marvelous can<n>recreate
the phenomenon.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ooh, then let's try it together this time!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Maaarvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even though we all wave our light<n>sticks around
wildly, there's no sign<n>of the mysterious light.
Perhaps<n>whatever made it has gone already.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It could be that certain criteria must be<n>met in
order to trigger that light, such<n>as time of day and
coordination of our<n>sticks.

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: But we're all as pretty as real stars<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We are! ☆ And I'm sure the<n>marvelousness
you're all spreading<n>will reach that light! ★ I'm
positive! ☆
